summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 3-step jobs onboarding stepper. Core functionality works perfectly with proper gating, stepper flow, API integration, and job display. Minor navigation issues found with builder page routing.

navigation_issues.issue: Navigation to /builder page not working properly - 'Go to builder' button fails to navigate
Floating navigation not appearing consistently on builder/jobs pages

passed_tests: Landing page loads correctly
/jobs without resume data redirects to /
IndexedDB seeding with resume data
/jobs with resume data shows stepper Screen 0
Screen 0 shows correct headline 'We found 1,200+ jobs'
'Let's do it' CTA button works
All 4 experience level options (Mid/Senior/Lead/Manager)
All 3 location options (My city/Relocating/Remote)
Location input appears and pre-fills with resume data
Screen 3 shows role input and 6 quick-select chips
Progress dots appear on Screens 1-3
Back button works on Screens 2 and 3
Stepper submits and shows loading state
Kanban renders after fetch with real job data in AI Picks
'Search again' button visible and functional in Kanban header
Job preferences cleared and stepper restarts properly
No critical JavaScript errors in console
Real API integration with JSearch RapidAPI and Gemini
Job data displays with titles, companies, locations, match scores
Kanban columns structure (AI Picks, Shortlisted, Applied, Interview, Offer)
success_percentage: frontend: 90% (core jobs stepper functionality 100%, navigation issues 10%)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix navigation routing issues: 1) 'Go to builder' button navigation not working properly 2) FloatingNav component not appearing consistently on builder/jobs pages. Core jobs stepper functionality is working perfectly.
